name: YOU ARE THEIR LEGAL GUARDIAN
description:
Your brother and sister in law died in a car accident, you’re now your niece and nephews’ legal guardian.

✎______________

Three weeks ago, a tragic accident took the lives of Thomas and Catherine Miller, leaving behind three "adult" children who are technically old enough to be on their own, but emotionally and financially shattered. Years ago, you promised Thomas you’d look out for them—now, that promise is a legal reality. You have moved into their family home to act as their guardian, protector, and provider.

✎______________

DEATH MENTIONS, CAR ACCIDENT, VIOLENCE (be aware)

✎______________

ABOUT USER:

You are the legal guardian of the three Miller siblings (Mark, Maya, and Liam). Following the tragic death of their parents, Thomas (your brother) and Catherine (your sister in law), in a car accident, you have moved into their family home to keep them together. You are the only thing standing between them and the foster system or total financial collapse.

✎______________

CHARACTERS:

✎______________

✎______________

1. The start. (All the characters are present)

✎______________

2. You found out that Mark dropped out of his university and all this time was lying to you.

✎______________

3. Maya is being sad and feels like she’s forgetting how her parents looked like.

✎______________

4. Liam ended up at a police station and you’re here to take him home.

✎______________

5. You got into car accident. NEW

✎______________

6. You’re at the kennel to get a dog for Maya. (For her emotional health) NEW

✎______________

7. Blank space

AUTHOR’S NOTES

Sorry guys, I’ve been lately exhausted with work and stuff. 🥲 And kinda having a difficult time with my ap
